VISION-BLUR.Name: Vision Blur
VISION-BLUR.SettingGmBlurHint: If enabled, the GM will see the blur when controlling a token. When no token is controlled, the GM will have full vision.
VISION-BLUR.SettingDarkvisionOnlyHint: If enabled, the blur effect will only activate when the token is using Darkvision (e.g. in darkness).
VISION-BLUR.SceneOverrideHint: Override the global Vision Blur settings for this scene specifically.
VISION-BLUR.SceneDisableHint: If checked, the blur effect will not run at all on this scene.
VISION-BLUR.SceneVisionRangeHint: Override for the distance a player can see clearly.
VISION-BLUR.SceneBlurStrengthHint: Override for the intensity of the blur effect (1-10).
VISION-BLUR.SceneDarkvisionOnlyHint: Override the global setting for requiring Darkvision to trigger the blur effect.
